subcodes.first_line: O Land of Ṣád! Where is that Supreme Sacrifice, before Whom no ransom was accepted in the path of God, the Lord of all humanity [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ارض الصاد این الذبح الاعظم الذی ماقبل الفدی فی سبیل الله مولی الوری و
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @martyrs and martyrdom, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @prayer for martyrs, @consolation and comfort
